variant_name: 高父 — 书房辞官时的退守家门形象
trigger: 在高府书房中，高父受女儿劝说写下辞官奏折，正式从官场退一步，以求保住家业与家人性命。

appearance_delta.face: 脸色更沉，忧思更重，带有下定决心后的疲惫与清醒
appearance_delta.body: 伏案书写时更显清瘦，胸口旧疾与精神压力让他略有虚弱感
appearance_delta.hair: 发髻整肃但因久坐书写略显凝滞沉重，鬓边白发存在感更强
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 手边辞官奏折强化其从文臣到退守父亲角色的转变，文弱外表下显出关键时刻的担当

costume_override.outfit: 便于书写处理家事的深色家常长袍或半正式文臣袍服，袖口利落，整体低调

visual_reference: middle-aged ancient Chinese scholar-official writing a resignation memorial in a study, thin and weary father, kind worried face with pronounced wrinkles, slightly graying temples, neat topknot, dark muted scholar robe in deep teal and gray-blue, seated at a desk with brush, inkstone and paper, solemn decision to leave office, restrained historical realism, cinematic study interior
